meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for MacBook repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: MacBook Repair Services | Expert Mac Repairs
page.metaDescription: Professional MacBook repair services including screen replacement, battery replacement, keyboard repair, liquid damage restoration, and data recovery. Fast turnaround and quality parts.
page.heroDescription: From cracked Retina displays to liquid damage and keyboard issues, we repair all MacBook Air and Pro models in Winnipeg.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked Retina display or dead pixels? We replace MacBook Air and Pro screens.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: MacBook battery swelling or not holding charge? Same-day battery replacement for most models.

services.name: Keyboard Replacement
services.description: Sticky butterfly keys or unresponsive Magic Keyboard? Complete keyboard replacement.

services.name: Data Recovery
services.description: Lost files from a failed SSD or corrupted drive? We recover data from damaged MacBooks.

services.name: Liquid Damage Repair
services.description: Coffee or water spill? We specialize in liquid damage restoration.

services.name: Charging Issues
services.description: MacBook not charging? We diagnose and repair MagSafe, USB-C ports, battery connectors.

advantage_pillars.title: M1, M2 & M3 Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Expert repairs for Apple Silicon MacBooks.

advantage_pillars.title: Fast Turnaround
advantage_pillars.description: Most MacBook repairs completed within one business day once parts arrive.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Free Diagnostics
advantage_pillars.description: Not sure what's wrong? We provide free diagnostics.

models_description: We repair all MacBook models from Intel-based machines to the latest M3 Apple Silicon.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: MacBook repair costs are driven by the display and logic board. Apple's battery service documentation explains when replacement is recommended.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that a MacBook display can cost more than the original laptop. iFixit's MacBook teardowns illustrate the complexity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your MacBook's current value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery or data transfer to a new device is often still an option.

faqs.question: How long does MacBook screen replacement take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most MacBook screen replacements are completed within 1-3 business days.

faqs.question: Can you recover data from a water-damaged MacBook?
faqs.answer: Yes, in many cases we can recover data from liquid-damaged MacBooks.

faqs.question: Do you repair MacBooks with Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3)?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We're experienced with Apple Silicon MacBooks.

faqs.question: How much does MacBook battery replacement cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by model. Contact us for a free quote.

faqs.question: Is my data safe during MacBook repair?
faqs.answer: We prioritize data security. Your files remain untouched during hardware repairs.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for MacBook repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
